name: ISO/IEC 42001:2023
description: International standard specifying requirements for establishing, implementing, maintaining, and continually improving an Artificial Intelligence Management System (AIMS); Annex A provides reference control objectives and controls.

controls.label: Policies related to AI
controls.description: Objective: To provide management direction and support for AI systems according to business requirements.

controls.label: AI policy
controls.description: The organization shall document a policy for the development or use of AI systems.

controls.label: Alignment with other organizational policies
controls.description: The organization shall determine where other policies can be affected by or apply to, the organization's objectives with respect to AI systems.

controls.label: Review of the AI policy
controls.description: The AI policy shall be reviewed at planned intervals or additionally as needed to ensure its continuing suitability, adequacy and effectiveness.

controls.label: Internal organization
controls.description: Objective: To establish accountability within the organization to uphold its responsible approach for the implementation, operation and management of AI systems.

controls.label: AI roles and responsibilities
controls.description: Roles and responsibilities for AI shall be defined and allocated according to the needs of the organization.

controls.label: Reporting of concerns
controls.description: The organization shall define and put in place a process to report concerns about the organization's role with respect to an AI system throughout its life cycle.

controls.label: Resources for AI systems
controls.description: Objective: To ensure that the organization accounts for the resources (including AI system components and assets) of the AI system in order to fully understand and address risks and impacts.

controls.label: Resource documentation
controls.description: The organization shall identify and document relevant resources required for the activities at given AI system life cycle stages and other AI-related activities relevant for the organization.

controls.label: Data resources
controls.description: As part of resource identification, the organization shall document information about the data resources utilized for the AI system.

controls.label: Tooling resources
controls.description: As part of resource identification, the organization shall document information about the tooling resources utilized for the AI system.

controls.label: System and computing resources
controls.description: As part of resource identification, the organization shall document information about the system and computing resources utilized for the AI system.

controls.label: Human resources
controls.description: As part of resource identification, the organization shall document information about the human resources and their competences utilized for the development, deployment, operation, change management, maintenance, transfer and decommissioning, as well as verification and integration of the AI system.

controls.label: Assessing impacts of AI systems
controls.description: Objective: To assess AI system impacts to individuals or groups of individuals, or both, and societies affected by the AI system throughout its life cycle.

controls.label: AI system impact assessment process
controls.description: The organization shall establish a process to assess the potential consequences for individuals or groups of individuals, or both, and societies that can result from the AI system throughout its life cycle.

controls.label: Documentation of AI system impact assessments
controls.description: The organization shall document the results of AI system impact assessments and retain results for a defined period.

controls.label: Assessing AI system impact on individuals or groups of individuals
controls.description: The organization shall assess and document the potential impacts of AI systems to individuals or groups of individuals throughout the system's life cycle.

controls.label: Assessing societal impacts of AI systems
controls.description: The organization shall assess and document the potential societal impacts of their AI systems throughout their life cycle.

controls.label: AI system life cycle
controls.description: Controls for the responsible design, development, and operation of AI systems across their life cycle.

controls.label: Management guidance for AI system development
controls.description: Objective: To ensure that the organization identifies and documents objectives and implements processes for the responsible design and development of AI systems.

controls.label: Objectives for responsible development of AI system
controls.description: The organization shall identify and document objectives to guide the responsible development AI systems, and take those objectives into account and integrate measures to achieve them in the development life cycle.

controls.label: Processes for responsible AI system design and development
controls.description: The organization shall define and document the specific processes for the responsible design and development of the AI system.

controls.label: AI system life cycle
controls.description: Objective: To define the criteria and requirements for each stage of the AI system life cycle.

controls.label: AI system requirements and specification
controls.description: The organization shall specify and document requirements for new AI systems or material enhancements to existing systems.

controls.label: Documentation of AI system design and development
controls.description: The organization shall document the AI system design and development based on organizational objectives, documented requirements and specification criteria.

controls.label: AI system verification and validation
controls.description: The organization shall define and document verification and validation measures for the AI system and specify criteria for their use.

controls.label: AI system deployment
controls.description: The organization shall document a deployment plan and ensure that appropriate requirements are met prior to deployment.

controls.label: AI system operation and monitoring
controls.description: The organization shall define and document the necessary elements for the ongoing operation of the AI system. At the minimum, this should include system and performance monitoring, repairs, updates and support.

controls.label: AI system technical documentation
controls.description: The organization shall determine what AI system technical documentation is needed for each relevant category of interested parties, such as users, partners, supervisory authorities, and provide the technical documentation to them in the appropriate form.

controls.label: AI system recording of event logs
controls.description: The organization shall determine at which phases of the AI system life cycle, record keeping of event logs should be enabled, but at the minimum when the AI system is in use.

controls.label: Data for AI systems
controls.description: Objective: To ensure that the organization understands the role and impacts of data in AI systems in the application and development, provision or use of AI systems throughout their life cycles.

controls.label: Data for development and enhancement of AI system
controls.description: The organization shall define, document and implement data management processes related to the development of AI systems.

controls.label: Acquisition of data
controls.description: The organization shall determine and document details about the acquisition and selection of the data used in AI systems.

controls.label: Quality of data for AI systems
controls.description: The organization shall define and document requirements for data quality and ensure that data used to develop and operate the AI system meet those requirements.

controls.label: Data provenance
controls.description: The organization shall define and document a process for recording the provenance of data used in its AI systems over the life cycles of the data and the AI system.

controls.label: Data preparation
controls.description: The organization shall define and document its criteria for selecting data preparations and the data preparation methods to be used.

controls.label: Information for interested parties of AI systems
Information for interested parties of AI systems
controls.description: Objective: To ensure that relevant interested parties have the necessary information to understand and assess the risks and their impacts (both positive and negative).

controls.label: System documentation and information for users
controls.description: The organization shall determine and provide the necessary information to users of the AI system.

controls.label: External reporting
controls.description: The organization shall provide capabilities for interested parties to report adverse impacts of the AI system.

controls.label: Communication of incidents
controls.description: The organization shall determine and document a plan for communicating incidents to users of the AI system.

controls.label: Information for interested parties
controls.description: The organization shall determine and document their obligations to reporting information about the AI system to interested parties.

controls.label: Use of AI systems
controls.description: Objective: To ensure that the organization uses AI systems responsibly and per organizational policies.

controls.label: Processes for responsible use of AI systems
controls.description: The organization shall define and document the processes for the responsible use of AI systems.

controls.label: Objectives for responsible use of AI system
controls.description: The organization shall identify and document objectives to guide the responsible use of AI systems.

controls.label: Intended use of the AI system
controls.description: The organization shall ensure that the AI system is used according to the intended uses of the AI system and its accompanying documentation.

controls.label: Third-party and customer relationships
controls.description: Objective: To ensure that the organization understands its responsibilities and remains accountable, and risks are appropriately apportioned when third parties are involved at any stage of the AI system life cycle.

controls.label: Allocating responsibilities
controls.description: The organization shall ensure that responsibilities within their AI system life cycle are allocated between the organization, its partners, suppliers, customers and third parties.

controls.label: Suppliers
controls.description: The organization shall establish a process to ensure that its usage of services, products or materials provided by suppliers aligns with the organization's approach to the responsible development and use of AI systems.

controls.label: Customers
controls.description: The organization shall ensure that its responsible approach to the development and use of AI systems considers their customer expectations and needs.
